programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: In a revenge game, Eagles stun Chiefs with 21-17 comeback win. Jalen Hurts shines in the rain and seals victory with late touchdown.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Sam Darnold leads the Minnesota Vikings to 5-0 in London against Aaron Rodgers and the New York Jets, 23-17. Rodgers threw 3 INTs on the day before getting twisted up awkwardly while getting tackled by several Vikings defenders.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jalen Hurts threw a touchdown pass and Darius Slay had a 70-yard interception return for a score as Philadelphia built a big early lead, then hung on at the finish to beat the New England Patriots, 25-20.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: In a game with eight lead changes, the Browns ultimately come out victorious following a monster performance from Myles Garrett who finished the game with two sacks, two forced fumbles and blocked field goal to lead to a final score of 39-38.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Cleveland Browns defensive end Myles Garrett set a new milestone with 23 sacks, as the Cleveland Browns pass rusher broke rival T.J. Watt and Hall of Famer Michael Strahan's shared single-season sack record.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: Highlights from 1994 Week 2 game between the San Francisco 49ers and Kansas City Chiefs!

programme.title: NFL Top 10

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the Broncos' 31-24 win over the Indianapolis Colts in Week 1 of the 2014 season. QB Peyton Manning's 3 TD passes lift Denver to a victory over his former team.
